title: Incorrect handling of UTF8 characters on SPARQL HTTP endpoint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_utf8 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(500));
INSERT INTO test_utf8 (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'stavební objekty', 'Test description with UTF8 characters: ěščřžýáíé');
SELECT * FROM test_utf8 WHERE name ILIKE '%stavební%';
UPDATE test_utf8 SET description = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_utf8 WHERE description IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of UTF8 characters in SPARQL queries
